sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: U-Haul International President J.T. Taylor Honored with TRALA’s Legacy Award
feed.summary: John "J.T." Taylor, President of U-Haul International, was awarded the Truck Renting and Leasing Association’s (TRALA) Steve Lawrence Legacy Award for his significant contributions to the industry and the association. Taylor has served on TRALA's Board of Directors for over 20 years and has been President of U-Haul International since 2006, leading the company for two decades. The award recognizes his exceptional leadership and long-term dedication, highlighting his 45-year career at U-Haul.

feed.title: Kristi Higgins Joins Raymond James Investment Management as Head of ETF Strategy
feed.summary: Raymond James Investment Management has appointed Kristi Higgins as Head of ETF Strategy. In this role, Higgins will support the development and expansion of the firm's active ETF platform, reporting to Johan Grahn and working with Matt Johnson and Susan Walzer. Higgins brings extensive experience in launching and scaling ETF businesses, having played a key role in bringing over 30 ETFs to market across various asset classes.

feed.title: International Paper to Acquire North Pacific Paper Company
feed.summary: International Paper (IP) has announced an agreement to acquire North Pacific Paper Company (NORPAC) for $360 million. This acquisition will add NORPAC's paper mill in Longview, Washington, which produces approximately one million tons of containerboard annually, to IP's portfolio. The move is intended to enhance IP's strategic presence on the West Coast, increase system flexibility, reduce costs, and expand capabilities to meet growing customer demand for lightweight, high-performance recycled containerboard.

feed.title: Investors buy Dollar General location in Monroe for $2.63M
feed.summary: A group of out-of-state investors, Nibur 12A Briarcliff Manor LLC and Nibur 12B Briarcliff Manor LLC, has purchased a 7,428-square-foot Dollar General store in Monroe for $2.63 million. The property, located at 685 Main St., was sold by 686 DG Monroe LLC. The transaction highlights the appeal of single-tenant retail properties to out-of-state buyers due to stable, triple-net lease agreements, with Dollar General having a 15-year lease on the newly built location.

feed.title: A $170M Miami mansion dwarfed March's priciest U.S. home deals
feed.summary: Homes.com, a CoStar Group company, released its analysis of the most expensive publicly marketed home sales in major U.S. metropolitan areas for March. A "to-be-built" mansion in Miami's Indian Creek Island topped the list at $170 million, far exceeding other high-value transactions. Other leading markets such as Los Angeles and New York City also saw significant sales, emphasizing the continued concentration of ultra-luxury demand across various U.S. regions.

feed.title: UHG Shareholder Alert: June 9, 2026 Lead Plaintiff Deadline in United Homes Group, Inc. Securities Class Action Lawsuit -- The Gross Law Firm
feed.summary: The Gross Law Firm has issued a shareholder alert for United Homes Group, Inc. (UHG) regarding a securities class action lawsuit. Shareholders who purchased UHG shares between May 19, 2025, and February 22, 2026, are encouraged to contact the firm, with a lead plaintiff deadline of June 9, 2026. The lawsuit alleges that the controlling shareholder, Nieri, intentionally devalued the company and forced a sale, not acting in the best interest of the company or public investors.

feed.title: Missouri drivers urged to slow down as water crews work statewide
feed.summary: Missouri American Water is emphasizing work zone safety during National Work Zone Awareness Week, from April 20-24, 2026. The company urges motorists to stay alert, slow down, and maintain adequate braking distance when driving through work zones where crews are upgrading and maintaining water and wastewater infrastructure. This initiative aims to protect both workers and drivers, highlighting the shared responsibility for road safety.

feed.title: Starbucks K-Cup pods stay on Keurig machines as Nestlé pact expands
feed.summary: Keurig Dr Pepper (KDP) and Nestlé USA have extended their strategic partnership to renew and expand the manufacturing and distribution of Starbucks K-Cup pods across the U.S. and Canada. This agreement, building on their 2020 collaboration, aims to further distribution and product innovation for Starbucks at-home coffee on the Keurig brewing platform. The move reinforces KDP's coffee expansion strategy, aligning with its recent JDE Peet's acquisition and plans for a Global Coffee Co. separation.

feed.title: Used in 185,000 stores, retail tech unit enters its sixth decade
feed.summary: Sensormatic Solutions, a retail technology unit of Johnson Controls, is celebrating 60 years of innovation, having secured over 1,700 patents. The company provides data-driven solutions to retailers in 185,000 stores across more than 80 countries, focusing on areas like loss prevention, operational efficiency, and enhancing the shopper experience. Sensormatic Solutions aims to continue transforming retail by developing next-gen technologies and fostering collaboration within the industry.

feed.title: IT Shareholder Alert: Gartner, Inc. Securities Class Action Lawsuit Investors With Losses May Join -- The Gross Law Firm
feed.summary: The Gross Law Firm has issued a shareholder alert for investors of Gartner, Inc. (NYSE: IT) who purchased shares between February 4, 2025, and February 2, 2026. The firm is encouraging shareholders to join a securities class action lawsuit, alleging that Gartner disseminated materially false and misleading statements regarding its growth rates and ability to meet consulting revenue targets. The lawsuit highlights significant stock price declines following announcements of unexpected drops in Gartner's contract value growth rate.

feed.title: IT Investors Have Opportunity to Lead Gartner, Inc. Securities Fraud Lawsuit with the Schall Law Firm
feed.summary: The Schall Law Firm is reminding investors of a class action lawsuit against Gartner, Inc. (NYSE: IT) for alleged securities fraud. The lawsuit claims Gartner made false and misleading statements regarding its seasonality risk and contract value growth between February 4, 2025, and February 2, 2026. Investors who suffered losses during this period are encouraged to contact the Schall Law Firm before May 18, 2026, to discuss their rights.

feed.title: VITL Shareholder Alert: Investors With Losses May Seek to Lead the Class Action in Vital Farms, Inc. Securities Lawsuit -- The Gross Law Firm
feed.summary: The Gross Law Firm has issued a shareholder alert for investors of Vital Farms, Inc. (NASDAQ: VITL) who incurred losses from May 8, 2025, to February 26, 2026. The lawsuit alleges that Vital Farms made false and misleading statements regarding the implementation of an enterprise resource planning (ERP) system, leading to shipment delays and loss of retail shelf space. Investors are encouraged to contact the firm to potentially be appointed as lead plaintiff by the May 26, 2026 deadline.

feed.title: Shipbuilder HII taps Silicon Valley AI firm for Navy vessel software
feed.summary: HII and Applied Intuition have signed a Memorandum of Understanding (MOU) to collaborate on "Warship OS™", an AI-defined operating system for maritime platforms. This partnership aims to integrate AI capabilities into HII's ROMULUS unmanned surface vessels and potentially extend to crewed ships, enhancing performance and scalability. Despite the strategic importance of AI-related announcements, previous similar MOUs by HII have historically seen slight negative stock price movements in the short term.

feed.title: Travelers says employees gave 125,000 hours as donations hit $24M
feed.summary: The Travelers Companies, Inc. announced its 2025 community report, detailing approximately $24 million in charitable contributions and over 125,000 volunteer hours from its employees. The report highlights the company's commitment to improving academic and career success, developing thriving neighborhoods, and creating culturally enriched communities. Travelers has invested more than $237 million over the past decade in these areas.

feed.title: Trimble set to acquire AI-powered Document Crunch
feed.summary: Trimble has signed an agreement to acquire Document Crunch, an AI-powered platform specializing in construction-specific document analysis and risk management. This acquisition will integrate Document Crunch's CrunchAI technology into Trimble's construction solutions, helping customers identify and mitigate project risks earlier in the AEC/O lifecycle. The move aims to prevent costly errors, reduce administrative burden, and infuse intelligence into Trimble's project delivery ecosystem, with the acquisition expected to close in Q2 2026.

feed.title: Seceon Recognized in the 2026 Gartner® "Voice of the Customer" Report for Security Information and Event Management
feed.summary: Seceon Inc., a provider of AI-driven cybersecurity solutions, has been recognized in the 2026 Gartner® "Voice of the Customer" report for Security Information and Event Management (SIEM). The recognition is based on verified customer reviews, with Seceon achieving an overall rating of 4.6 out of 5.0 stars and 90% of reviewers willing to recommend the platform. This highlights Seceon's strong performance in threat detection and response, ease of deployment, and high customer satisfaction within the SIEM market.

feed.title: Snap-on Inc stock (US8335511049): Is its repair tool dominance strong enough to unlock new upside?
feed.summary: Snap-on Inc. (US8335511049) is highlighted for its strong position in the automotive aftermarket, driven by its direct-sales model and specialized tools for professional technicians. The article emphasizes the company's resilience, diversification across industrial sectors, and ability to adapt to new vehicle technologies like electric vehicles. It also discusses Snap-on's competitive advantages, analyst perspectives, and risks, positioning it as a stable investment for those seeking exposure to the durable tools sector and essential services.

feed.title: Pfizer Inc. stock (US7170811035): Is its post-COVID pivot strong enough to unlock new upside?
feed.summary: Pfizer is transitioning its business focus from COVID-related sales to oncology, vaccines, and rare disease treatments, aiming for sustained growth. The company's strategy involves internal innovation, strategic acquisitions like Seagen, and operational efficiency to achieve mid-single-digit revenue growth. While facing risks like patent cliffs and competition, analysts view Pfizer as undervalued, supported by its strong R&D pipeline, dividend yield, and continuous capital returns.

feed.title: NRG Energy Keeps Quarterly Dividend of $0.475 per Share, Payable May 15 to Shareholders of Record as of May 1
feed.summary: NRG Energy has announced it will maintain its quarterly dividend of $0.475 per share. The dividend is scheduled to be paid on May 15 to shareholders who are on record as of May 1. This news was published on April 21, 2026, at 08:54 AM EDT.

feed.title: United Microelectronics Corporation (NYSE:UMC) Receives Consensus Recommendation of "Strong Sell" from Analysts
feed.summary: Five ratings firms have collectively given United Microelectronics Corporation (NYSE:UMC) an average recommendation of "Strong Sell." Three analysts recommend selling, and two suggest holding the stock, with an average target price of $8.60. Despite recent analyst activity, institutional investors like Mirae Asset Global Investments Co. Ltd. and Arax Advisory Partners have increased their holdings.

feed.title: Caterpillar Stock Can Gain 20%, Analyst Says. How Meta Might Give Shares a Boost.
feed.summary: An analyst predicts Caterpillar stock could rise by 20%, partly due to potential benefits from Meta. The article discusses a target price boost given to Caterpillar and notes its significant 124% increase over the past 12 months.

feed.title: Jabil Inc stock (US4663131039): Why Google Discover changes matter more now
feed.summary: This article explains how Google's 2026 Discover Core Update significantly impacts how investors receive information about Jabil Inc (JBL) stock, moving from a search-driven model to a proactive, personalized mobile feed. It highlights how Discover tailors content to user interests based on Web and App Activity, providing real-time insights into Jabil's financial performance, strategic shifts, and market positioning without manual searching. The update is presented as a crucial tool for investors to stay ahead with high-signal, low-noise information on this NYSE-listed stock.

feed.title: Optas LLC Has $3.16 Million Stock Holdings in Cisco Systems, Inc. $CSCO
feed.summary: Optas LLC significantly increased its stake in Cisco Systems, Inc. during the fourth quarter, purchasing an additional 26,818 shares to bring its total holdings to 41,002 shares valued at $3.16 million. Despite notable insider selling by CEO Charles Robbins and other executives, institutional investors collectively own 73.33% of the company's stock. Cisco recently reported strong Q1 earnings, slightly exceeding revenue estimates, and raised its quarterly dividend to $0.42 per share, while analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" consensus with an $89.81 price target.

feed.title: Truist Financial Begins Coverage on CenterPoint Energy (NYSE:CNP)
feed.summary: Truist Financial initiated coverage on CenterPoint Energy (NYSE:CNP) with a "Buy" rating and a $48.00 price target, suggesting a 12.45% upside. This new rating contributes to a mixed analyst consensus of "Hold" with an average price target of $44.15 across eight "Buy" ratings, six "Hold" ratings, and one "Sell" rating. CenterPoint Energy recently reported Q4 EPS of $0.45, slightly missing estimates, but revenue exceeded expectations, with FY2026 EPS guidance set at $1.90.

feed.title: Mozzarella Cheese Market Is Booming So Rapidly |The Kraft Heinz Company, Fonterra Co-operative Group Limited, Groupe Lactalis S.A., Grande Cheese Company
feed.summary: A new report from Coherent Market Insights forecasts strong growth for the Mozzarella Cheese Market, projecting it to reach USD 64.46 billion by 2032 with a CAGR of 6.46% from 2025. The study provides in-depth analysis of market segments, competitive landscapes, growth drivers, and regional trends. This report aims to offer valuable insights for businesses, investors, and industry participants to support informed decision-making.

feed.title: The Goldman Sachs Group, Inc. $GS Shares Sold by Northern Financial Advisors Inc
feed.summary: Northern Financial Advisors Inc. significantly reduced its stake in The Goldman Sachs Group by selling 38.6% of its shares, now holding 2,310 shares valued at $2.03 million. Despite this, other institutional investors like Silver Coast Investments LLC and Optas LLC increased their positions. The article also covers Goldman Sachs' recent Q1 earnings exceeding expectations, positive analyst ratings, and insider stock sales by CEO David M. Solomon and CFO Denis P. Coleman.

feed.title: Caterpillar Inc. $CAT Shares Sold by Northern Financial Advisors Inc
feed.summary: Northern Financial Advisors Inc. significantly reduced its stake in Caterpillar Inc. by 48.3% in the fourth quarter, selling 2,498 shares and holding 2,671 shares valued at $1.53 million. Despite this, other institutions like Marquette Asset Management LLC and Noble Wealth Management PBC increased their holdings. Wall Street analysts have a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating for Caterpillar with an average target price of $761.64.

feed.title: Northern Financial Advisors Inc Sells 144 Shares of NVR, Inc. $NVR
feed.summary: Northern Financial Advisors Inc reduced its stake in NVR, Inc. (NYSE:NVR) by 32.1% in the fourth quarter, selling 144 shares and holding 305 shares valued at $2.22 million. Other institutional investors like State of Wyoming, USA Financial Formulas, and Zions Bancorporation National Association UT also made adjustments to their NVR holdings. The article also details recent insider stock sales, analyst ratings, and NVR's financial performance, including its latest earnings beat and a new $750 million share buyback authorization.

feed.title: Northern Financial Advisors Inc Sells 3,713 Shares of American Express Company $AXP
feed.summary: Northern Financial Advisors Inc significantly reduced its stake in American Express Company by 42.2% in the fourth quarter, selling 3,713 shares and now owning 5,084 shares valued at $1.88 million. This comes amidst varied institutional investor activity and mixed analyst ratings, with the stock currently holding a "Hold" consensus. American Express recently reported a slight EPS miss for Q1 but increased its quarterly dividend.

feed.title: Stifel lowers J.M. Smucker stock price target on valuation concerns By Investing.com
feed.summary: Stifel cut its price target for J.M. Smucker Co. (NYSE:SJM) shares to $100 from $120, maintaining a Hold rating due to valuation concerns that balance legacy business momentum with the need to rebuild profitability in its Sweet Baked Snacks segment. The firm applies an 8x EV/EBITDA multiple to its 2027 estimates, reflecting an anticipated compression from the current 9.42, and highlights elevated debt leverage post-Hostess acquisition. Other analysts have varying outlooks, with BTIG initiating a Buy rating, TD Cowen lowering its target, and Bernstein upgrading to Outperform, while Barclays notes reduced promotional spending among packaged food companies.

feed.title: IBM launches AI-powered customer experience solutions with Adobe
feed.summary: IBM has launched new AI-powered customer experience solutions, developed in partnership with Adobe, to address challenges in the airline and healthcare sectors. These solutions leverage Adobe's Customer Experience Orchestration capabilities and IBM's AI tools like watsonx Orchestrate. IBM's research indicates that companies using such solutions can significantly reduce customer acquisition costs, improve customer satisfaction, and increase retention rates, while its stock appears undervalued according to InvestingPro.

feed.title: Evercore ISI Adjusts Price Target on Digital Realty Trust to $230 From $200, Maintains Outperform Rating
feed.summary: Evercore ISI has increased its price target for Digital Realty Trust (DLR) to $230 from $200, while reiterating an Outperform rating. This adjustment reflects a positive outlook for the company. The article also notes other recent analyst rating changes and provides an overview of Digital Realty Trust's operations and financial standing.

feed.title: Wedbush Raises Price Target on Travere Therapeutics to $53 From $44, Keeps Outperform Rating
feed.summary: Wedbush has increased its price target for Travere Therapeutics (TVTX) to $53 from $44, while maintaining an "Outperform" rating on the stock. This adjustment follows recent positive developments for the biopharmaceutical company, including FDA approval for some of its treatments for rare kidney diseases. The company specializes in identifying, developing, and delivering therapies for rare kidney and metabolic diseases, with commercial products like Thiola and Thiola EC.

feed.title: Seaport Global Adjusts Price Target on Las Vegas Sands to $69 From $72, Maintains Buy Rating
feed.summary: Seaport Global has adjusted its price target for Las Vegas Sands (LVS) to $69, down from $72, while reiterating its "Buy" rating. This update reflects a minor revision in their valuation despite maintaining a positive outlook on the company. The article also lists recent analyst adjustments, highlighting ongoing assessments of LVS by various financial institutions.

feed.title: IQVIA Holdings Inc stock (US46266C1053): Why does its real-world data edge matter more for investors
feed.summary: IQVIA Holdings Inc. (US46266C1053) is a leader in healthcare intelligence, leveraging its real-world data and analytics to support drug development and commercialization. The company's integrated platform and focus on real-world evidence position it for growth, especially as regulators increasingly demand proof of drug effectiveness. Investors can benefit from IQVIA's data monetization strategy, resilience in the healthcare sector, and its critical role in digitizing life sciences, particularly in the United States and other English-speaking markets.

feed.title: Two veteran Masco executives are retiring after 23 and 37 years
feed.summary: Masco Corporation announced the retirements of Jai Shah, Group President, Plumbing and Wellness (23 years), and Rick Marshall, Vice President, Masco Operating System (37 years), effective July and September 2026, respectively. The company also announced new leadership appointments, including Jill Ehnes as President of Delta Faucet Company and North America Plumbing, Arun Iyer as Vice President, Chief Supply Chain Officer & Masco Operating System, and Steven Nikolopoulos as Vice President, Chief Procurement Officer. These changes aim to streamline the Executive Committee and enhance the company's strategic execution.

feed.title: Citigroup Adjusts Price Target on Prologis l to $165 From $145, Maintains Buy Rating
feed.summary: Citigroup has increased its price target for Prologis Inc. (PLD) to $165 from $145, while reiterating a Buy rating on the stock. This adjustment comes amidst other analyst updates for Prologis, including JPMorgan, Scotiabank, and Jefferies, all raising their price targets and maintaining positive ratings. The company recently filed for two notes offerings and its CEO anticipates prolonged tailwinds from AI and data center expansion.

feed.title: Unusual Machines secures $5M+ drone component order By Investing.com
feed.summary: Unusual Machines, Inc. (NYSE American:UMAC) announced it received an order exceeding $5 million from Autonomous Power Corporation (Powerus) to supply U.S.-made, NDAA-compliant components for counter-unmanned aircraft systems and drones. Deliveries for this new market for their U.S.-manufactured parts began in April and are expected to conclude within the second quarter. Powerus is also slated for a proposed merger with Aureus Greenway Holdings Inc. (Nasdaq:AGH), which recently raised $9 million in a private placement and has appointed retired Lt. General Keith Kellogg to its Board of Advisors.

feed.title: Intuitive Surgical, Inc. stock (US46120E6023): Is its robotic surgery dominance strong enough for th
feed.summary: Intuitive Surgical (US46120E6023) dominates the robotic surgery market with its da Vinci systems, utilizing a "razor-and-blades" model where recurring revenue from instruments and services drives profitability. The company's expansion into new surgical specialties and focus on AI enhancements, coupled with favorable reimbursement policies in the U.S. and growing international adoption, suggests a strong position for future growth. However, competition from Medtronic and Johnson & Johnson, potential pricing pressures, and regulatory delays pose risks that investors should monitor.

feed.title: Stifel cuts General Mills stock price target on volume concerns By Investing.com
feed.summary: Stifel has lowered its price target for General Mills (NYSE:GIS) to $40 from $44, while maintaining a Buy rating on the stock. This adjustment is attributed to continued volume softness in key categories and limited earnings growth projected for fiscal year 2027. Despite the recent 25% decline in stock price over the last six months, InvestingPro suggests the stock is undervalued, and it currently offers a 6.92% dividend yield.

feed.title: Marriott Vacations will post Q1 results before an 8:30 a.m. call May 5
feed.summary: Marriott Vacations Worldwide Corporation (NYSE: VAC) announced it would report its first-quarter 2026 financial results on Tuesday, May 5th. The company will host a conference call at 8:30 a.m. ET on the same day to discuss the results, with details provided for call access and webcast viewing through their investor relations website. An audio replay will also be available for 30 days.

feed.title: Novem Group Makes New Investment in Allegion PLC $ALLE
feed.summary: Novem Group has initiated a new investment in Allegion PLC (NYSE:ALLE) by acquiring 8,773 shares valued at approximately $1.397 million in the fourth quarter. Despite this, Allegion recently missed Q4 earnings expectations and issued FY2026 guidance below analyst consensus. The company also declared a quarterly dividend of $0.55 per share, and institutional investors now own about 92.21% of the stock.

feed.title: Neuronetics to Report First Quarter 2026 Financial and Operating Results and Host Conference Call
feed.summary: Neuronetics, Inc. (NASDAQ: STIM) announced it will release its first quarter 2026 financial and operating results before market open on Tuesday, May 5, 2026. The company will also host a conference call at 8:30 a.m. Eastern Time on the same day to discuss these results.

feed.title: Novem Group Raises Holdings in Amgen Inc. $AMGN
feed.summary: Novem Group significantly increased its stake in Amgen Inc. by 811.6% in the fourth quarter, now holding 13,975 shares valued at approximately $4.57 million. Amgen also reported strong fourth-quarter earnings, beating analyst estimates with an EPS of $5.29 and revenue of $9.87 billion, and declared a quarterly dividend of $2.52 per share. Institutional investors own 76.50% of the company, which has a market cap of $188.97 billion.

feed.title: Novem Group Purchases 9,205 Shares of Merck & Co., Inc. $MRK
feed.summary: Novem Group increased its stake in Merck & Co., Inc. by 23.1% in the fourth quarter, now owning 48,989 shares valued at $5.16 million. Despite recent insider selling, institutional investors hold 76.07% of the stock. Merck faces mixed news with new FDA priority reviews and EU approvals, alongside a setback in a Phase 3 cancer drug trial.

feed.title: Executive Jai Shah to leave Masco (NYSE: MAS) with exit package
feed.summary: Masco Corporation announced that Jai Shah, its Group President, Plumbing and Wellness, will depart on July 3, 2026. An agreement outlines his exit package, including a cash payment of $1,206,000, a prorated 2026 cash bonus, and a cash equivalent for prorated annual restricted stock units. He may also receive a prorated share award under the 2024-2026 Long-Term Incentive Program and a cash payment for previously unvested retention RSUs, which themselves are forfeited.

feed.title: 4,533 Shares in Waste Management, Inc. $WM Purchased by Michael Brady & Co. LLC
feed.summary: Michael Brady & Co. LLC recently acquired 4,533 shares of Waste Management (NYSE: WM) worth approximately $996,000, making it their 14th biggest position. The stock is largely held by institutional investors (80.4%), has a consensus "Moderate Buy" rating, and analysts have recently increased price targets, with Wells Fargo raising theirs to $273. Despite a slight miss on Q4 EPS and revenue, Waste Management increased its quarterly dividend to $0.945, yielding 1.7% annually.

feed.title: Gilead, Arcus tumble again in TIGIT, triggering 2 trial culls
feed.summary: Gilead Sciences and Arcus Biosciences are discontinuing their late-stage TIGIT drug domvanalimab due to futility in the STAR-121 lung cancer trial, leading Gilead to scale back its collaboration with Arcus. This failure also prompted the termination of another Phase 2 study and signifies a broader trend of disappointments in the TIGIT-targeting therapy space, following setbacks for other major pharmaceutical companies. Despite prior successes with domvanalimab in gastric cancers, the TIGIT class has largely proven unsuccessful, resulting in significant upfront investments that have not paid off.

feed.title: 34,277 Shares in Duke Energy Corporation $DUK Bought by Meritage Portfolio Management
feed.summary: Meritage Portfolio Management has acquired 34,277 shares of Duke Energy Corporation, valued at approximately $4.02 million, during Q4, indicating growing institutional interest. Duke Energy reported strong Q4 earnings, surpassing analyst expectations with an EPS of $1.50 and revenue of $7.94 billion. Despite CEO Louis E. Renjel selling a portion of his shares, analysts maintain a consensus "Hold" rating with an average price target of $140.38 for the stock.

feed.title: Inside Gaming: Strip casino operator unveils more summer deals
feed.summary: Caesars Entertainment is offering various hotel, dining, and entertainment deals across its Las Vegas resorts for the summer, including discounts on stays, bundled packages, and spa/show specials. Meanwhile, J.P. Morgan analyst Daniel Politzer has outlined three potential scenarios for a realistic sale of Caesars Entertainment, valuing the company in the low-to-mid $30 per share range, with a management-led buyout being the most straightforward path. The article also covers the debut of a new slot game at Plaza, UNLV's upcoming gambling conference, and Resorts World Las Vegas naming a new international marketing executive.
